warnings: Ignored the instruction-only publication heading because it did not list concrete items.
The professor's name appears as 'Zhao Fenghuan' in the English title line, but the listing metadata uses 'Zhao Fengnian'. The alias 'Zhao Fenghuan' has been recorded.
The 'Received Bachelor's degree' line lacks an explicit start date; start_text is left empty.
The 'International Affairs Coordinator' role is treated as academic_service due to its nature, but its temporal context is unclear.

The 'Researched at Interactive Cognition Laboratory' and 'Worked as TA at Department of Cognitive Science' lines are assumed to be part of the visiting scholar period but are listed as separate employment experiences due to distinct organization names.
Award names contain unmatched angle brackets (e.g., '<Software Engineering Practice>', 'Multimedia Technology>', '<Web Design>') which are preserved as-is.
The 'Planned Textbooks' and 'Published several academic papers' lines under work experience are not concrete items and are not extracted.
The 'Taught the following courses...' description under work experience is not extracted as a separate experience item.
The 'Published more than 20 books...' line under work experience is not extracted as a publication due to lack of concrete details.
